commits.role: sidecar contract module, warrant fixture tests, contract documentation

limits: Contract only: no sidecar generation, bulk processing, fidelity assessment, graph-packing, context-selection integration, provider exposure, or persistence exists; each is a later separately governed slice documented in SIDECAR_CONTRACT.md.
Token ranges are validation hypotheses estimated with whitespace_word_count_v1 and are not calibrated against provider tokenizers; the token-estimator sensitivity check remains parked.
fidelity_category defaults to unassessed; no mechanism assesses semantic fidelity yet.
Staleness compares source content hashes only; it does not verify source_repo_commit against git history.
name: Compact artifact sidecar contract
recommended_next_actions: Propose the sidecar generation slice under GAP-0002, consuming the structured generator field for provenance and validate_sidecar_record as its acceptance gate.
Run the parked token-estimator sensitivity check before any decision consumes profile-compliance findings.
risks: If future generation produces sidecars without running validate_sidecar_record, invalid records could enter docs/sidecars undetected until an audit slice exists.
Whitespace token estimates may diverge materially from provider tokenizers, making the profile hypotheses misleading until calibrated.
summary: A static, generation-agnostic contract for derived AI-optimized compact sidecars attached to canonical repository artifacts: schema v1 with thirteen semantic fields and full provenance including a structured generator (provider, identity, version); deterministic identity <source_artifact_id>::<profile>, deterministic path docs/sidecars/<id>.<profile>.json, and byte-stable canonical serialization; profiles rich_immediate (token hypothesis 250-500, no omission) and concise_second_level (80-200, omission allowed only with every omitted field listed in omitted_fields); token hypotheses reported as findings never schema failures; fidelity categories carried but unassessed; and three-valued staleness assessment via the shared verification-outcome vocabulary. Canonical human-readable artifacts remain the sole authoritative source; sidecars are derived and regenerable.
